For production vector search, three options dominate the market:

1. Pinecone is the managed service most widely adopted by enterprise teams [1].
2. Qdrant is the leading self-hosted alternative, written in Rust for performance [2].
3. Weaviate offers a hybrid approach with both hosted and self-managed deployments [3].

References:
[1] https://www.pinecone.io/learn/
[2] https://qdrant.tech/documentation/
[3] https://weaviate.io/developers/weaviate
